title: Black Plastic Wire Brushes Set (3 Pieces) - Assorted Bristle Types & Head Lengths, Ideal for Removing Stubborn Dirt, Old Paint & Rust
features: ASSORTED BRISTLE TYPES: Each pack contains a variety, featuring nylon for delicate surfaces, steel for heavy-duty rust and paint removal, and copper for flexibility and durability in cleaning tasks.

DURABLE & RELIABLE: Constructed with high-quality materials, this 3-piece set is bound to be your go-to cleaning solution for years to come. With proper care, these brushes will maintain their effectiveness and make cleaning a breeze.

OPTIMAL DESIGN FOR EASE OF USE: Featuring two assorted head lengths, these brushes are designed to provide you comfort and efficiency, allowing easy access to hard-to-reach areas without extra effort.

IDEAL FOR REMOVING STUBBORN GRIME: Specifically engineered for challenging cleaning tasks, our brushes excel in stripping away stubborn dirt, old paint, and rust, revitalizing your items with minimal effort.

VERSATILE MATERIAL SELECTION: This 3-piece set features brushes made from brass, steel, and plastic materials, offering a wide range of cleaning capabilities. Whether dealing with delicate surfaces or tough grime, our set has you covered.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality set of wire brushes contains three individual brushes that are perfect for removing stubborn dirt, old paint and rust feature two assorted head lengths. Safety Warning No warning applicable
